## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation (docs, comments, README)
- [ ] Tests (new or improved test coverage)
- [ ] CI/CD / Tooling
- [ ] Examples / Notebooks
- [ ] Bug fix (backward compatible change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (backward compatible change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`make lint format`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] This PR addresses a single concern (not bundling unrelated changes)
